productDisplayName: Nike Women Jersey Cuffed Black Capris
description: CompositionBlack capris for women made of 61% cotton, 33% polyester and 6% spandex, has a broad elasticated waistband and drawstring, elasticated hem and embroidered branding below the waistband on the left and at the back on the rightFitRegularWash careGentle machine wash inside out with like colours using cold waterDo not bleach, or dry cleanLine dryDo not ironWhatever the occasion, be it a visit to the mall or park, jogging or just hanging out with friends, this pair of capris from nike is a well deserved addition to your casual wardrobe. The sporty look does wonders for your casual style and the soft fabric keeps you extremely comfy. Pair it with a sporty T-shirt and running shoes.
